title: equisetum × litorale var. vulgare
intro: Equisetum × litorale var. vulgare, also known as common horsetail, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family and is characterized by its distinctive, hollow, and grooved stems. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Equisetum × litorale var. vulgare include reducing urinary tract infections, treating kidney stones, and alleviating symptoms of arthritis and gout. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
